message:
test(chaos): add 30 property-based tests for chaos testing harness (wa-1u90p.7.1)

Covers: FaultPoint/FaultTrigger/ChaosReport serde roundtrips,
FaultPoint Display snake_case invariant, Display-serde consistency,
scenario builder accumulation, FaultMode construction robustness
(probability clamping, arbitrary inputs), assertion evaluation on
clean injectors, pre-built scenario structural validation, and
apply_scenario/clear_all/drain_log state management.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
